title: M2 Action Registry
description: Schema for the machine-readable action inventory (action_registry.json) and recipe steps. Validates the structure required by the unified M2 verifier architecture (canonical spec §5).

$schema.description: Optional self-reference to this schema file.

version.description: Semver version of the registry format.

generated.description: ISO date when the registry was generated or last updated.

families.description: Family metadata keyed by family code (F1, F2, etc.).

actions.description: Action entries keyed by action ID (T1, U2, S7, etc.).

generatorReadiness.description: Family-level generator readiness from capability canon Part 8.

canonActionCount.description: Total actions in this family per capability canon inventory.

registryActionCount.description: Number of actions from this family present in the actions map of this registry file.

blockingIssue.description: Family-level blocking issue, or null if READY.

id.description: Unique action identifier matching capability canon (T1, U2, S7, etc.).

generatorReadiness.description: Whether this specific action can be extracted to a generated recipe.

acceptanceEligible.description: True if the action uses only user-reachable UI gestures (no page.evaluate action driving).

selectorKey.description: Key into selectors.mjs, or null if the action has no single DOM trigger (e.g., canvas gestures).

paramBindings.description: Preparatory input steps the runner must execute before the main gesture. Each binding maps a recipe param to a DOM input element and the gesture used to set it. Empty array if the action needs no preparatory inputs.

gestureType.description: Key into selectors.mjs gestureTypes. Must match a defined gesture.

preconditions.description: State conditions that must hold before executing this action.

postconditions.description: Expected state changes after executing this action.

blockers.description: Specific blockers preventing generator extraction. Empty array if READY.

paramBinding.description: A preparatory input step: set a DOM input element to a value before the main action gesture. The runtime value comes from recipe step params[paramKey].

selectorKey.description: Key into selectors.mjs for the input element to set.

gestureType.description: Gesture used to set the input value. Only input-setting gestures are valid here.

paramKey.description: Key in the recipe step's params object that provides the runtime value.

stateConditions.description: State field assertions. Keys are getState() field names. Values describe expected states.

recipeStep.description: A single step in a workflow recipe (for future recipe_generator.mjs).

params.description: Action-specific parameters (file path, coordinates, option value, etc.).

recipe.description: A complete workflow recipe (for future recipe_generator.mjs).

family.description: Primary action family this recipe exercises.
